seoTitle: Not sure yet — show everything after 10th — courses, exams & careers | SkillKite
seoDescription: After 10th — every stream and option compared, if you're still deciding

guide.heading: SkillKite — 10th ke baad aapke options
guide.greeting: Hi there! You mentioned you are not sure about your interest area yet, and you want both study and earning options. That is completely okay — being confused at this stage is very normal. Neeche saare realistic options diye hain taaki aap properly compare karke decide kar sako. Koi bhi decision abhi final nahi hai — explore karo.

sections.title: Study options
sections.intro: Since you are confused about your interest, all options are shown equally — read each one carefully and notice which ones feel exciting to you. That feeling is a good clue about your interest.

options.name: 12th Arts / Humanities
options.whatIsIt: History, Geography, Political Science, Psychology, Sociology jaise subjects padhte ho. Agar abhi science ya maths clearly pasand nahi hai, Arts ek flexible aur wide-open path hai.
options.whoFor: Students jo confused hain, ya jinhe reading, writing, society, current affairs, ya languages mein thodi bhi curiosity hai. Pressure comparatively kam hota hai.
options.leadsTo: BA, Law (LLB), Journalism, Teaching (B.Ed), Civil Services (IAS/IPS), Social Work, Mass Communication, Hotel Management, Design aur bahut kuch.
options.keyExams: CLAT (Law), DU/State University entrance, CUET, NID/NIFT (Design), various state-level exams
options.timeCommitment: 2 years 12th, phir 3–5 years graduation depending on field

options.name: 12th Commerce
options.whatIsIt: Accounts, Business Studies, Economics padhte ho. Agar money, business, ya entrepreneurship thoda bhi interesting lagta hai, yeh ek practical aur job-friendly stream hai.
options.whoFor: Students jo business, banking, finance, ya apna kaam shuru karne mein curious hain. Maths optional hota hai — Maths wala aur bina Maths wala, dono variants available hain.
options.leadsTo: B.Com, BBA, CA (Chartered Accountant), CS, Banking jobs, MBA, E-commerce, Accounting, Insurance sector.
options.keyExams: CA Foundation, CUET, BBA entrance exams (IPU CET, SET, etc.), various state university exams

options.name: Polytechnic Diploma (3 years, direct after 10th)
options.whatIsIt: Engineering aur technical skills ki practical training directly 10th ke baad — college jaane ki zaroorat nahi pehle. Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Computer Science, Electronics jaise branches hote hain.
options.whoFor: Students jo hands-on technical kaam mein interest rakhte hain, ya jaldi ek stable job ya earning chahte hain. Agar you are confused but lean slightly towards practical work, yeh strong option hai.
options.leadsTo: Junior Engineer (government aur private), Technician jobs, further B.Tech Lateral Entry (2nd year direct), self-employment in technical services.
options.keyExams: State Polytechnic Entrance Exams — jaise UP JEECUP, AP POLYCET, MH CET (Polytechnic), Delhi CET. Admission criteria state ke hisaab se alag hote hain.

options.name: 12th Science with Maths (PCM)
options.whatIsIt: Physics, Chemistry, Maths padhte ho. Engineering, architecture, ya technology mein jaana ho toh yeh standard path hai. Syllabus demanding hai — honestly bolein toh mehnat zyada lagti hai.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe Maths mein genuine interest hai ya engineering/tech field clearly attract karta hai. Confusion ke bawajood agar numbers comfortable lagte hain toh consider karo.
options.leadsTo: IIT/NIT (B.Tech), Engineering colleges, Architecture (B.Arch), BCA, BSc Maths/Physics, Merchant Navy, Defence exams.
options.keyExams: JEE Main, JEE Advanced, MHT CET, WBJEE, BITSAT, CUET, NDA (Defence)
options.timeCommitment: 2 years 12th, phir 4 years B.Tech/BE or 3 years BSc

options.name: 12th Science with Biology (PCB)
options.whatIsIt: Physics, Chemistry, Biology padhte ho. Medical field mein jaana ho — doctor, nurse, paramedic — toh yeh path hai. NEET bahut competitive hai, honestly preparation intense hoti hai.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe living organisms, human body, ya healthcare genuinely fascinating lagta hai. Confused ho toh ek baar biology ka ek chapter padhke dekho — curiosity feel hoti hai ya nahi.
options.leadsTo: MBBS (Doctor), BDS (Dentist), BAMS (Ayurveda), Nursing (B.Sc Nursing), Physiotherapy, Biotechnology, BSc Biology.
options.keyExams: NEET-UG (very competitive — lakhs of students compete for limited seats), AIIMS, state medical entrance exams
options.timeCommitment: 2 years 12th, phir 4.5–5.5 years MBBS or 3–4 years other medical courses

options.name: 12th Science with Maths + Biology (PCMB)
options.whatIsIt: PCM aur PCB dono saath padhte ho — Maths bhi, Biology bhi. Zyada subjects matlab zyada options open rehte hain, lekin workload bhi zyada hota hai.
options.whoFor: Students jo confused hain between engineering aur medical — dono doors open rakhna chahte hain. Lekin honest advice: yeh combination bahut heavy hai, sirf tab lo agar aap genuinely strong student ho aur dono fields mein interest lagta ho.
options.leadsTo: Both engineering AND medical paths open — JEE aur NEET dono de sakte ho. BSc, Biotech, Bioinformatics bhi option hai.
options.keyExams: JEE Main, NEET-UG (dono ke liye alag-alag heavy preparation needed)
options.timeCommitment: 2 years 12th (intense), phir 4–5.5 years depending on field

options.name: Paramedical Diploma after 10th (DMLT, ANM, X-Ray Tech, etc.)
options.whatIsIt: Medical field mein supporting roles ke liye short diplomas — jaise DMLT (Lab Technician), ANM (Nursing), X-Ray Technician, OT Technician. Directly 10th ke baad ho sakte hain.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe healthcare field mein interest hai lekin MBBS jitna lamba aur expensive path nahi lena — ya jo jaldi earn karna chahte hain alongside studying.
options.leadsTo: Government aur private hospitals mein jobs — Lab Technician, Nursing Assistant, Radiographer. Aage B.Sc Paramedical bhi kar sakte ho.
options.keyExams: Most institutions mein 10th marks ke basis pe admission — kuch mein entrance test bhi hota hai. State-wise vary karta hai.

sections.title: Job & earning options
sections.intro: Yeh sab kaam 10th ke baad part-time ya full-time kar sakte ho — padhai ke saath bhi. Confused hona earning start karne se nahi rokta. Kuch skills seekhne mein sirf 1–3 mahine lagte hain.

options.name: Graphic Design (Canva / Figma)
options.whatIsIt: Social media posts, logos, posters, banners design karna — clients ke liye ya freelance mein. Canva se shuru kar sakte ho, Figma se professional level pe aao.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe visual cheezein pasand hain — colors, layouts, creativity. Interest clear nahi hai toh yeh ek low-risk skill hai explore karne ke liye.
options.leadsTo: Freelancing on Fiverr/Internshala, social media manager, small business clients, eventually full-time design career.
options.timeCommitment: 1–2 months basics seekhna, phir projects shuru karo

options.name: Content Creation (YouTube / Instagram Reels)
options.whatIsIt: Videos banao apni life ke baare mein, kisi topic pe, ya kisi skill ke baare mein. Slowly audience build hoti hai, phir brand deals ya AdSense se income aati hai.
options.whoFor: Students jo camera ke saamne comfortable hain ya koi interesting topic jaante hain — cooking, study tips, gaming, travel, anything. Consistency key hai.
options.leadsTo: Social media influencer, brand collaborations, YouTube monetization, eventually digital marketing career.
options.timeCommitment: Consistent daily effort — income aane mein 6–12 months lag sakte hain, patient rehna zaruri hai

options.name: Meesho / Reselling Business
options.whatIsIt: Meesho ya GlowRoad jaise apps se products apne contacts aur social media pe becho — koi investment nahi chahiye shuru mein. Commission milta hai har sale pe.
options.whoFor: Students jo business aur selling mein curious hain aur apne local network use karna chahte hain. Bahut low risk, zero investment option.
options.leadsTo: Side income, business skills develop hoti hain, aage apna dropshipping ya e-commerce business shuru kar sakte ho.
options.timeCommitment: Flexible — 1–2 ghante daily kaafi hai shuru mein

options.name: Data Entry / Typing Work
options.whatIsIt: Computers pe data type karna, forms fill karna, Excel mein entries karna — basic typing speed aur accuracy chahiye. Offline aur online dono options hain.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe stable, simple part-time kaam chahiye padhai ke saath. Glamorous nahi hai, but honest earning hai.
options.leadsTo: Office assistant jobs, BPO/data processing companies, freelance data entry on Upwork/Fiverr.
options.timeCommitment: Typing speed improve karne mein 3–4 weeks, phir kaam dhundh sakte ho

options.name: Mobile Phone Repair
options.whatIsIt: Smartphones ki screen change karna, battery replace karna, software issues fix karna — yeh skill locally seekhi ja sakti hai ek technician se.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe technical / hands-on kaam pasand hai. Har mohalle mein demand hai is skill ki — bahut practical option hai.
options.leadsTo: Apni mobile repair shop, service center mein job, electronics technician as a long-term career.
options.timeCommitment: 2–3 months apprenticeship under a local technician

options.name: Photography / Videography
options.whatIsIt: Events, portraits, products ya reels ke liye photos aur videos lena. Shuru mein smartphone se bhi kaam chalata hai.
options.whoFor: Students jo creative hain aur visual storytelling mein naturally interested feel karte hain — ya jinhone social media pe reels banane ki koshish ki hai.
options.leadsTo: Freelance photographer/videographer, wedding shoots, product photography for small businesses, YouTube production.
options.timeCommitment: 1–2 months basics, phir local clients dhundho

options.name: Tailoring / Stitching
options.whatIsIt: Clothes stitch karna, alterations karna, blouses ya simple garments banana — ek traditional but highly in-demand skill.
options.whoFor: Students who are patient, detail-oriented, aur creative with fabric and design. Girls aur boys dono ke liye equally valid option hai.
options.leadsTo: Home-based tailoring business, boutique, fashion designing further education (NIFT), or garment industry jobs.
options.timeCommitment: 3–6 months basic training from a local tailor or government ITI

options.name: Tally / Basic Accounting
options.whatIsIt: Tally software seekhna — local shops, small businesses ki GST aur accounts maintain karna. Short courses available hain offline aur online dono.
options.whoFor: Students jinhe numbers aur commerce thoda comfortable lagta hai. Agar Commerce 12th soch rahe ho, toh yeh parallel earning skill hai.
options.leadsTo: Part-time accountant at local shops, BPO data work, aage full CA ya B.Com ke saath strong career in finance.
options.timeCommitment: 1–2 months Tally course, phir local clients ya small businesses se kaam mil sakta hai

guide.closingMessage: Yeh guide save kar lo aur apne parents/teachers se discuss karo. Confused rehna ek stage hai — har kisi ke saath hota hai. Koi bhi ek skill try karo earning side se, aur padhai mein ek stream choose karo jo thodi bhi exciting lage — dono decisions wapas change ho sakte hain. Jab aap 12th pass kar lo, SkillKite pe wapas aana — tab hum detailed career roadmap banake denge. Apne dost ko bhi share karo — unhe bhi help mil sakti hai. 🪁
